falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by more than 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal and indicate a confirmed trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme market stress or momentum, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN status and suggesting a blowoff top scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug reaches 90% or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A 90%+ similarity would confirm the pattern's validity, falsifying the UNKNOWN verdict by proving the model's pattern recognition is accurate and actionable.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
